name: Red Clam Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic, sautéing until fragrant and translucent.
3. Add the minced clams, tomato paste, water, lemon juice, parsley, sugar, rosemary, and thyme to the skillet.
4. Stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
6. Cook uncovered for 15 minutes.
7. Serve over cooked linguine or other pasta (8 ounces) with grated Parmesan cheese, if desired.
